direction.audience_fit: Hackathon builders and judges who need fast understanding, proof, and energy without hype.

typography.heading: Aptos Display, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.body: Aptos, Avenir Next, Helvetica Neue, Arial, sans-serif
typography.mono: SF Mono, Cascadia Code, Consolas, monospace

patterns.title_slide: Short stage-ready line with one support sentence.
patterns.section_slide: Sparse divider with a single short rule or transition.
patterns.table_slide: Few rows, short cells, high contrast.
patterns.comparison_slide: Two panels with a clear include-versus-backup split.
patterns.code_slide: Readable mono excerpt only when code is the proof.
patterns.architecture_slide: Simple left-to-right demo route with no more than five nodes.
patterns.quote_slide: One retellable sentence, centered and sparse.

decisions.decision: Use the dark-runtime direction for a demo-stage hackathon deck.
decisions.rationale: The subject is a live demo, but the deck still needs restrained contrast and readable proof.
